These dice can be used to resist frenzy, Rötschreck, aux damage caused by the sun and the effects of the True Faith They can also be used to wake up from a daytime torpor or staying awake during the day. The dice unspent disappear at the next dawn or dusk, whichever comes first.

If either character dies in this dream, the character also dies for real
